name: sengkrep-ryna
description: A reliability layer for web scraping in Node.js: schema validation, selector health monitoring, adaptive retry, fingerprint randomization, diff detection, caching, session management, proxy rotation, HTTP/2, circuit breaker, resumable crawling, schema inference, distributed job queues, and full TypeScript definitions.

scripts.test: node test/01-fetcher-and-extraction.js && node test/02-orchestration.js && node test/03-reliability-modules.js && node test/04-content-safety-and-utils.js && node test/05-bugfixes-and-schema-inference.js && node test/06-robots-retry-pagination.js

author: qrtz
